scope_note: QA Witt Tower Mutual Information ENSO Cert [465]. Introduces empirical mutual information I(orbit_tier; ENSO_phase) as the 5th QA feature type for physical domain certs [442]-[452], alongside amplitude RMS, zero-crossing rate, Poisson count, and spectral entropy. Domain: NOAA Oceanic Nino Index (ONI), monthly, 1950-2026, N=916. Label: 3-class ENSO phase (La Nina ONI<=-0.5, Neutral, El Nino ONI>=0.5). Orbit feature: Witt tower tier T0/T1/T2 = rank bins 0-8/9-17/18-26 in Z/27Z (MOD=27). MAPPING: ONI float anomaly -> observer projection; rank normalization -> integer bin in Z/27Z; bin//9 -> tier integer {0,1,2}; Theorem NT satisfied. RESULTS: MI_obs=1.0745 bits; H(ENSO_phase)=1.5373 bits; MI_ratio=0.699 (70% of label entropy captured). Permutation null: 0/5000 shuffles exceed obs MI (perm_p=0.0000). 3x3 contingency table near-diagonal: (T0,La Nina)=252/252, (T1,Neutral)=305/419, (T2,El Nino)=245/245 dominant cells. Pointwise MI (PMI) on diagonal: T0/La Nina=+1.582, T1/Neutral=+1.128, T2/El Nino=+1.587 (all positive; off-diagonal cells negative). GATES: (C1) N=916>=900, all 3 phases detected PASS. (C2) Tier balance T0=306/T1=305/T2=305 within +-3% of n/3 PASS. (C3) MI=1.07>0.8 bits PASS. (C4) perm_p=0.0000<0.001 PASS. (C5) MI_ratio=0.699>0.60 PASS. (C6) All diagonal PMI positive PASS. CONTEXT: cert [445] established same dataset with hypergeometric tests (log10_p=-172 La Nina, log10_p=-166 El Nino). MI reframes the finding in information-theoretic units: 70% of ENSO phase entropy is captured by the QA orbit-tier partition alone. The off-diagonal neutral months in T0 (53) and T2 (60) suppress MI below theoretical maximum (1.537 bits) but the diagonal signal dominates. Primary source: NOAA CPC Oceanic Nino Index (public domain) via psl.noaa.gov/data/correlation/oni.data; Wall (1960) doi:10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541. Structural parents: cert [110] (Witt tower framework), cert [445] (ENSO hypergeometric validation). Validated 2026-06-19.
